description:
How one chaotic build made history.
🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/how-disneyland-was-built

00:00 - Intro
01:21 - In a rut
02:23 - Inspiration strikes
03:19 - The plan
04:59 - Work begins
06:30 - Tricks of the trade
09:00 - Groundbreaking
10:46 - Getting things ready
11:37 - More tricks
13:51 - Opening day
15:45 - The future

Additional footage and images: Disney, Orange County Archives, City of Anaheim Public Library, Library of Congress, ABC.

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

We're raising awareness of construction's mental health crisis through our Get Construction Talking initiative. There’s a video series on our channel and you can find support or donate at - https://www.getconstructiontalking.org/
